properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Behind the wheel in every journey On the road, He is watching When I'm confused, in troubled time He is there calling me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Behind the wheel to nowhere highway I am lost but not forsaken When I'm down, hurt and falling Behind the wheel is my God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He carried me from harm on the dirt road Once upon a time, a miracle happened He carried my old cross on the dirt road Once upon a time, the Savior came down Behind the wheel is my God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Behind the wheel, my doubts and fear In a prayer, He is listening He comforts me, lead me on Behind the wheel is my God
